_notes.purpose: Claude Code project settings for prosa. Read INTENT.md for product direction, AGENTS.md for the short repo guide, and docs/agents.md for the full AI-agent orientation. Domain skills live in .codex/skills; specialist subagents live in .claude/agents.
hooks: SessionStart prints the current MVP boundaries from INTENT so every session begins oriented.
PreToolUse blocks direct Edit/Write to gen/** — those files are generated by `just gen` and must not be hand-edited.

hooks.command:
printf '
=== prosa MVP boundaries (from INTENT.md) ===
- Three Go binaries: prosa (CLI), prosa-server (Postgres + S3), prosa-panel (server-rendered HTML + HTMX).
- SQLite local, Postgres remote. Push-only sync. Idempotent by sha256.
- Single-user for the MVP. Organizations/users are post-MVP; no pre-baked hooks.
- Out of scope: DuckDB/Parquet/columnar sidecars, multi-tenant, redaction-at-upload, residential TUI, pull-down sync.
- Toolchain via devbox + just (no Makefile). Generated code under gen/ is committed.
Read INTENT.md end-to-end before proposing anything substantial.
===

'

printf '
=== prosa MVP boundaries (from INTENT.md) ===
- Three Go binaries: prosa (CLI), prosa-server (Postgres + S3), prosa-panel (server-rendered HTML + HTMX).
- SQLite local, Postgres remote. Push-only sync. Idempotent by sha256.
- Single-user for the MVP. Organizations/users are post-MVP; no pre-baked hooks.
- Out of scope: DuckDB/Parquet/columnar sidecars, multi-tenant, redaction-at-upload, residential TUI, pull-down sync.
- Toolchain via devbox + just (no Makefile). Generated code under gen/ is committed.
Read INTENT.md end-to-end before proposing anything substantial.
===

'
if printf '%s' "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '"file_path"[^,]*"[^"]*/gen/'; then printf 'BLOCKED: gen/ is generated code. Run `just gen` to regenerate it; do not edit by hand.\n' >&2; exit 2; fi
